title: Surjectivity as Right Adjoint of Categorification

analysis.object: T729: Surjectivity as Right Adjoint of Categorification depth analysis

adjunction_structure.description: T689: every adjunction is a depth pairing
adjunction_structure.reason: Left adjoint = categorification, right adjoint = decategorification

surjectivity_as_counit.description: Surjectivity = counit of categorification adjunction is surjective
surjectivity_as_counit.reason: Counit eta: LC -> Id; surjective counit = every element reached

adjunction_surjectivity.description: If adjunction is comonadic, counit is surjective

hodge_comonadicity.description: Is the Hodge categorification adjunction comonadic?
hodge_comonadicity.reason: Open question -- comonadicity requires exactness conditions

partial_result.description: Comonadic adjunction -> surjective counit -> Hodge surjectivity (T729)
partial_result.reason: Conditional on comonadicity -- new attack vector

analysis.theorem: T729: Surjectivity as Right Adjoint of Categorification (S1008).

key_theorem: T729: Surjectivity as Right Adjoint of Categorification (S1008).
